strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform
concerns: Lack of direct experience in cloud technologies
No explicit mention of advising customers or partners on AI adoption

response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and technical innovation, with experience in AI-agent infrastructure and a proven track record of technical leadership. However, there are concerns regarding their experience in cloud technologies and director-level roles.
